task_completion.description: Open the project in the ReqView application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window is open and displays a loaded project.
The 'SRS' document is active, indicated by a highlighted 'SRS' tab or document title in the ReqView interface.
The requirement with the ID 'SRS-5' is visible in the main document view and is selected or focused.

task_completion.description: Append the specified Acceptance Criteria to the description of SRS-5
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field for 'SRS-5' contains the newly added text including the phrases 'respond to user input within 2 seconds', 'displayed in the user's preferred language', and 'log all failed authentication attempts'.
The agent clicks the Save button (or File -> Save), or the final screenshot shows no 'unsaved changes' indicator (such as an asterisk '*') next to the SRS document name.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to make the edits, not a text editor or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application interface. There should be no terminal commands (like sed or echo) or code editors (like VS Code or nano) used to directly modify the SRS.json file.

integrity.description: The agent appended the new criteria rather than overwriting the existing description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The original description text for SRS-5 is still visible above the newly added Acceptance Criteria.

integrity.description: The agent edited the description field of the requirement, not a custom attribute or discussion thread.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is clearly typed into the main 'Description' or 'Text' column/pane for SRS-5, not in a separate comments or attachments section.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is actually the default 'ReqView ExampleProject' (ignore the 'Smart Home Controller' name in the prompt; do not penalize the agent for this discrepancy). The target document is 'SRS'. The agent must append three specific strings to the description of requirement SRS-5: 'respond to user input within 2 seconds', 'displayed in the user's preferred language', and 'log all failed authentication attempts'.
